creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
The good news:
This port supports DESTDIR out of the box

The bad news:
This autotools fix has nothing to do fixing F10 and F11 error:
tile_spinner.cpp:49:14: error: use of undeclared identifier 'rand'

So what is the point of the original autotools patch?  It doesn't seem to make any difference according to portsmon.
